title: 10 best herbal teas for arteriosclerosis
description: Crataegus monogyna, also known as hawthorn, teas helps with arteriosclerosis because of its unique ability to improve cardiovascular health. Rich in flavonoids, oligomeric proanthocyanidins (OPCs), and other bioactive compounds, hawthorn tea has been shown to help lower blood pressure, improve blood lipid profiles, and enhance blood vessel function.
